Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Respondent Peter Fortune To Petitioner Bin Bin Thomas'S Petition
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Ciarian O'Sullivan, Esq., in person, for Bin Bin Thomas, Petitioner.

Michael Freedman, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Peter Fortune, Respondent.

Peter Bloom, Esq., in person, for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and Mea Takatsu, Defendants in related Civil matter.

At the outset, the court discloses a previous working relationship with Mr. O'Sullivan at the Law Firm of Bridgett Hanson. No objection to the preceding is presented and the hearing on Respondent's Demurrer to Petitioner Bin Bin Thomas' Petition proceeds.

The matter is argued. At conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Examiner: Elif Sonmez-Kirsch. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments On The Grounds Of Undue Influence, Lack Of Capacity And Fraud; For Confirmation To Omitted Of Share Of Deceased Spouse'S Property Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ciarian O'Sullivan appeared in person for Bin Bin Thoms (petitioner).
Peter Bloom appeared via zoom for Wells Fargo Bank (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding the service of the notice, that this case has made no progress, and that no notices have been given. Mr. O'Sullivan stated that he has to communicate with his client thru a translator, that he may dismiss the first petition, and that he spoke with Mr. Bloom and he needs time to respond. The matter is continued to December 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
